# NIP-14 Reference Card

NIP-14 defines the "subject" tag for text (kind: 1) events. Required tags: none. Optional tags: subject. Filter pattern: ["subject": <string>]. Common use cases: threading messages, displaying message lists. Example: {"subject": "Hello World"}. Clients should replicate the subject tag when replying and may adorn it with "Re:".
